steps.title: Set up the factored form
steps.content: The graph passes through (10, 0) and (-5, 0), so these are roots. Thus $f(x) = a(x-10)(x+5)$ for integer $a > 1$.

steps.title: Compute a + b
steps.content: $a + b = a + (-5a) = -4a$. Since $a$ is an integer greater than 1, the smallest case is $a = 2$, giving $a + b = -8$.

steps.title: Eliminate choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — '-8': $-4a = -8 \Rightarrow a = 2$, which is an integer > 1. ✓
  • Choice B — '-4': $-4a = -4 \Rightarrow a = 1$, but $a$ must be greater than 1. ✗
  • Choice C — '5': $-4a = 5 \Rightarrow a = -1.25$, not a positive integer > 1. ✗
  • Choice D — '6': $-4a = 6 \Rightarrow a = -1.5$, not a positive integer > 1. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
